mapper.insert: insert into market_shipment(shipment_id, order_id, seller_user_id, carrier_name, tracking_no, shipping_remark, shipped_at) values(#{shipmentId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{sellerUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{carrierName}, #{trackingNo}, #{shippingRemark}, #{shippedAt})
